label: Left Atrium
desc: Upper-left chamber that receives oxygenated blood from the lungs.

label: Right Atrium
desc: Upper-right chamber that receives deoxygenated blood from the body.

label: Left Ventricle
desc: Main pumping chamber that sends oxygenated blood into the aorta.

label: Right Ventricle
desc: Pumps deoxygenated blood into the pulmonary artery to the lungs.

label: Aorta
desc: Largest artery: carries oxygen-rich blood from the left ventricle to the body.
